puzzle0.title: SIGNAL TUNING
puzzle0.description: Tune the emergency frequency until the hidden transmission locks.

event0.text: I will, but your signal is tearing apart.

event1.text: If you want my name, keep the channel alive long enough for me to say it.

event0.title: EMERGENCY AUDIO TRANSCRIPT
event0.content:
CHANNEL: 7.14 MHz
SIGNAL STATE: DISTORTED
VOICEPRINT: UNKNOWN FEMALE
RECOVERED FRAGMENTS:

"...anyone..."
"...relay is drifting..."
"...not Hale..."

Recommended action: manual signal tuning required.
event0.caption: Text reconstruction of distorted emergency audio from channel 7.14.
event0.message: [EMERGENCY AUDIO TRANSCRIPT ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

event2.text: If you can tune it, do it now.

event0.text: Do not let that channel lead.

event1.text: Tune it if you have to, but keep one hand on the exit.

event4.text: I was starting to think I'd die talking to static.

event5.text: And if Ethan Hale is on your other channel, you need to stop listening to him.

event0.text: You are speaking with Ethan Hale, aren't you?

event1.text: I know how insane I sound. I know he's probably been calm, helpful, maybe even funny.
He got to you first. That's the whole point.

event2.text: I am not asking you to like me. I am asking you to survive long enough to doubt him.
Of course that's the first thing he says.

event5.text: You don't know what you're doing.

event6.text: I know exactly what happens when everyone lets you speak first.

event2.text: I don't have much time, so I'm going to be blunt.
But if he starts steering this conversation, I cut the channel myself.

event0.title: SURVIVOR BIOMETRIC SCAN
event0.content:
CHANNEL SOURCE: 7.14 MHz
VOICEPRINT MATCH: MAYA CHEN
LIFE SIGNS: ACTIVE
OXYGEN: 18%
LOCATION ESTIMATE: DAMAGED RELAY CONSOLE / LOWER ACCESS SPINE
VISUAL FEED: UNAVAILABLE
STATUS: ALIVE / CRITICAL
event0.caption: Automated survivor verification generated from channel telemetry. No image recovered.
event0.message: [SURVIVOR BIOMETRIC SCAN ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

event3.text: Which is more than I can say for Hale.

event0.text: You want proof. Good. Keep wanting proof.

event1.text: But understand this: the station is very good at giving you records after everyone who could explain them is gone.
Hale, Rourke, Lin, Patel, Arman... and me.

event0.title: SURVIVOR STATEMENT: MAYA
event0.content:
TEXT TRANSCRIPT / CHANNEL 7.14

MAYA CHEN:
"There were six assigned crew members on ECHO. After the breach, only one confirmed biological survivor remained: me. The signal using Ethan Hale's identity is not a living crew member. Do not allow it to control station routing."

Transcript confidence: 91%
event0.caption: Text transcript reconstructed from Maya's stabilized emergency channel.

event2.text: And whatever is pretending to be Hale.
